title: Hypixel Premium: Skyblock & PvP
description: Hypixel Premium based on Forge 1.8.9, optimized for the best possible performance and experience using OneConfig. Good for all Hypixel minigames including Skyblock and PvP.
body:
# Hypixel Premium

We have all the best mods and everything you know and love when it comes to Skyblock and PvP features. It includes all the best performance mods to make your experience as smooth as possible and has OneConfig available using right shift to configure all of your favorite Hypixel Mods like Toggle Shift/Sneak, NEU (For bazaar prices and much more) and Partly Sane Skies (For Skyblock use).

## The BEST Performance

**This is the performance using my modpack**
![An island in skyblock showing over 220 fps using this modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10249998b6c9791caf5afc9dee14d51e89877eae.png)
**And this is Lunar Client's performance**
![An island in skyblock showing 208 fps using Lunar Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd26385efd98f0d11b657d2ef716fe560114c89.png)

### This modpack is more performant than even Lunar Client!


### Advanced Gui

**As you can see here this modpack has a built in dungeons map and other customizable HUD elements** (Note: The dungeon map isn't always empty like that I just started the run)

![An unfilled dungeon map unique to this modpack with keystrokes, cps and combo counter and other custon gui elements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/203bd5b535d8000a1e8e5fa91d646d9991b99ca3.jpeg)

**This is an example of the built in item sell price trackers, these can also show lowest auction price and more!**

![An item description of a poisonous potato showing Bazaar price](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15481e46153113c9000e3a366c623d1071048027.png)

### Shoutouts:
Merchar2 for creating the image for this pack.

If anyone wants to use a Lite Version of this modpack with less mods (very slightly less features) and a little bit better performance (229 vs 223 fps for myself but likely more impact on lower end PCs) and better load times use this pack also made by myself: [Hypixel Premium: Skyblock & PvP Lite](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hypixel-premium-skyblock-pvp-lite)

If you want to create a server but are sick of paying for minecraft servers or laggy Minehut servers **try making your own server with just a few clicks** and an easy user interface and setup **using Auto-Mcs**. I very much reccomend it.

[Auto-Mcs (Easy Server Creator)](https://www.auto-mcs.com/)

[Auto-Mcs Discord](https://discord.gg/wfpUjqmW)
